headline: Ford surges on energy business while US car buying remains slow
summary: Ford's (F) plans for a new energy storage business have sent the automaker's stock soaring. RBC Capital Markets lead equity analyst Tom Narayan reacts to what this may mean for the auto company while US car buying remains stilted since the pandemic.

headline: Assessing Aptiv (APTV) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Mixed Longer Term Returns
summary: Recent performance snapshot Aptiv (APTV) has drawn fresh attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock up 6.7% over the past week and 12.3% over the past month, but down 4.8% over the past 3 months and 13.4% year to date. See our latest analysis for Aptiv.
